offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inconsistent cash flow forecasting causes missed opportunities for reinvestment. We automate daily cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent cash flow forecasting leads to missed opportunities for reinvestment.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on cash flow issues
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try daily cash flow forecasts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Make a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early access for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
